summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Incorrect device name on DFU success screen while updating just the Charge Stand
scenario: DFU success screen displays headset name instead of Charge Stand name when updating only the Charge Stand via Device Settings > Software
description_clean: When updating only the Charge Stand via Device Settings > Software, the DFU success screen incorrectly shows the name of the headset instead of the name of the Charge Stand.
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Ensure only the Charge Stand firmware update is available (headset firmware is up to date)
Tap 'Update' or 'Install' to begin the firmware update for the Charge Stand
Wait for the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to complete
Observe the success screen displayed after the update finishes
expected: The DFU success screen should display the name of the Charge Stand (e.g., "Charge Stand updated successfully").
actual: The DFU success screen incorrectly displays the name of the headset instead of the name of the Charge Stand.
